title: Remove _du_conflicted_files and add direction parameter to _resolve_bead_state_conflicts
description: In src/agent_takt/gitutils.py: (1) Remove the _du_conflicted_files helper function (lines 199-222). (2) Update _resolve_bead_state_conflicts (line 224) to accept a direction: Literal['main', 'feature'] parameter. When direction='main' use git checkout --theirs for conflict resolution; when direction='feature' use git checkout --ours. Never invoke git rm in either resolution path. (3) Update both call sites: the call inside merge_branch (cwd=main, around line 295) passes direction='main'; the call inside merge_main_into_branch (cwd=feature worktree, around line 385) passes direction='feature'.
acceptance_criteria: direction='main' resolution path calls git checkout --theirs and never calls git rm
direction='feature' resolution path calls git checkout --ours
